2.anchor: shepherd the flock of God that is among you, exercising oversight,
not under compulsion, but willingly, as God would have you;
2.note: Some manuscripts omit as God would have you

1.note: Some manuscripts add for us for you

14.anchor: for the name of Christ, you are blessed, because the Spirit of glory
14.note: Some manuscripts insert and of power

18.anchor: what will become of the ungodly and the sinner?”
18.note: Greek where will the ungodly and sinner appear?

7.anchor: vessel, since they are heirs with you
7.note: Some manuscripts since you are joint heirs
Greek the head of the corner

13.anchor: Be subject for the Lord’s sake to every human institution,
13.note: Or every institution ordained for people

13.anchor: whether it be to the emperor

16.note: For the contextual rendering of the Greek word doulos

18.anchor: Servants, be subject to your masters with all respect, not only to the good and gentle but also to the unjust.

13.note: Greek girding up the loins of your mind
